audit_items.proof_trace: `ldap_send_initial_request` is declared as returning `ber_int_t` (a signed integer), not a pointer — the property's premise of 'NULL-check before dereference' is type-incorrect. All 12 call sites (modify.c, search.c, extended.c, sasl.c, delete.c, add.c, compare.c, modrdn.c, and 5 back-asyncmeta callers) check the integer return value for negative before using it as a message ID; `LDAP_PARAM_ERROR` is defined as -9 so `< 0` guards also cover the connectionless path.
